ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of carefully placing a bookmark between pages. It starts with both arms relaxed, then moves to one arm holding the bookmark, and finally to the bookmark being placed between pages. The sequence uses subtle movements to give the action a sense of gentle precision. Frame 1: Both arms are relaxed at the sides. Frame 2: The right arm moves upward, with the hand slightly curled as if holding a bookmark. Frame 3: The right arm moves forward, as if placing the bookmark between pages. Frame 4: The right arm returns to its relaxed position. Frame 5: Both arms return to a relaxed position.

frames.beat: both arms rest at the sides, ready
right arm lifts, hand poised to hold bookmark
right hand gently slides between pages
right arm withdraws, bookmark in place
both arms return to relaxed stillness
